text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: No paper exists with the exact title "Pretraining data detection for large language models: A calibrated probability approach." The closest real paper is "Pretraining Data Detection for Large Language Models: A Divergence-based Calibration Method" (arXiv:2409.14781) by Weichao Zhang et al. — a completely different subtitle, different arXiv ID, and entirely different authors from those cited. The cited arXiv ID (2402.01234) points to an unrelated physics paper, confirming this is a hallucinated reference.
LINK: NONE
